info.title: VideoSite API
info.description: HTTP API for the videosite relying party (stream.dreamxwarden.ca). Identity (login, registration, password reset, MFA-at-login) lives in DreamSSO, not here; videosite authenticates browsers via an OIDC RP flow that sets a `sid` session cookie. This schema is the CF API Shield "known endpoints" set for the /api/* surface (browser SPA API, the transcode worker API, and the first-run installer). The OIDC browser routes (/auth/*), the SSO event receiver (/backchannel/events, see docs/security/openapi-videosite-s2s.yaml), and static assets are out of scope here.

sessionCookie.name: sid
sessionCookie.description: Session cookie established by the OIDC RP flow (GET /auth/callback after signing in at DreamSSO). Required for every browser/SPA authenticated endpoint.

workerBearer.description: Bearer worker-session returned by POST /api/worker/auth (keyId/keySecret exchange). Required for every /api/worker/* endpoint except /auth itself.

installToken.name: token
installToken.description: First-run install token (also accepted as the install_token cookie). Gates GET /install and the /api/install/* endpoints while the site is uninstalled; absent/invalid returns a neutral 503. Not present on an installed site.

get.summary: Current session user with granted-permission-key array (or {user:null} when unauthenticated). No requireAuth: session-aware but never 401s — reads globally-loaded res.locals.user.

200.description: {user:{user_id,username,display_name,avatar,email,role_id,permissions[],permission_level,org_name,account_portal}} when signed in, or {user:null} when no valid session

get.summary: Public site settings (site name). No auth; always returns 200, falling back to defaults on DB error.
Caller's own profile picture (webp bytes), mirrored from the SSO with disk cache + S2S fetch on miss. Served private+immutable for 1 year.

200.description: image/webp avatar bytes (Cache-Control: private, max-age=31536000, immutable)

404.description: {error:'Not found'} — file does not match caller's sso_avatar, or bytes unavailable

get.summary: Course list for the home page. Returns courses visible to the caller: all active courses if permissions.allCourseAccess, otherwise only the caller's enrolled active courses (composed in-app from a cached base, never cached per-user).

200.description: { courses: [{ course_id, course_code, course_name, module_label, video_count, last_video_at }] }

get.summary: Course detail plus a paginated, sortable list of its videos. Access requires permissions.allCourseAccess or enrollment in the course; each video with has_poster gets a per-file HMAC posterToken minted for R2.

200.description: { course, videos: [...with posterToken], r2PublicDomain, pagination: { page, totalPages, total, limit } }

403.description: Not enrolled in this course (code: COURSE_FORBIDDEN).

404.description: Course not found or inactive (code: COURSE_NOT_FOUND).

get.summary: Video playback metadata plus the manifest base path and per-request HMAC playback token (and optional per-file posterToken). Requires permissions.allowPlayback, a finished video, and allCourseAccess or enrollment; also returns computed resumePosition from watch_progress.

200.description: { video, videoPath, videoType, resumePosition, hmacToken, r2PublicDomain, tokenValiditySeconds, posterToken }

403.description: Playback not allowed (code: no_playback_permission) or not enrolled (code: no_course_enrollment).

404.description: Video not found or not finished (code: video_not_found).

get.summary: User profile plus the caller's active sessions (device name parsed from user-agent, current-session flag, IP, last_seen/last_sign_in). Email is masked; avatar is the SSO avatar.

200.description: { profile: { user_id, username, display_name, avatar, maskedEmail, hasEmail, role_name, created_at }, sessions: [...] }

post.summary: Terminate all of the caller's sessions except the current one. No request body is read.

200.description: { success: true, message } — all other sessions terminated.

get.summary: Security overview for the profile page: MFA enabled flag, configured MFA methods (id, method_type, label, created_at), and whether an email is on file (masked).
List every course the caller may administer (enrollment-scoped, no is_active filter; not paginated).

403.description: Missing manageCourse permission

post.summary: Create a course.

403.description: Missing addCourse permission

422.description: Invalid course code or name length

get.summary: Get one course plus its videos (sanitized, secrets stripped).

403.description: Missing changeCourse or no course access (COURSE_FORBIDDEN)
Missing changeCourse or no course access

422.description: Invalid course code or name length

403.description: Missing deleteCourse or no course access

get.summary: Course edit payload: course, videos, default+enhanced global profiles, course profiles, audio normalization, audio bitrate.

200.description: { course, videos, defaultGlobalProfiles, enhancedGlobalProfiles, courseProfiles, audioNormalization, audioBitrateKbps }

403.description: Missing changeCourse or no course access

get.summary: Paginated video list for a course (fit-to-height paging, per-video poster HMAC tokens). Requires uploadVideo OR changeVideo (checkAnyPermission).

200.description: { course, videos, r2PublicDomain, total, page, totalPages }

403.description: Missing uploadVideo/changeVideo or no course access

get.summary: Materials list for a course (admin surface; same shape as the student materials endpoint).

403.description: Missing manageCourse or no course access

put.summary: Save per-course transcoding profiles (course must have use_custom_profiles).

400.description: No profiles, or course uses global profiles, or profile validation failed

403.description: Missing changeCourse or no course access

delete.summary: Reset a course back to global transcoding profiles.

403.description: Missing changeCourse or no course access

get.summary: Paginated user list (fit-to-height paging, level-scoped to caller's authority, optional search).

403.description: Missing manageUser permission

get.summary: User edit payload (identity is SSO-owned/view-only; only overrides+sessions editable). Step-up 'user' + checkPermissionLevel (must be strictly higher authority).

200.description: { targetUser, overrides, allPermissions, permissionPrereqs, canChangePermissions, adminPermissions }

403.description: Missing changeUser or target has equal/higher authority

put.summary: Update a user's permission overrides (delta-aware prereq validation; admin can only touch keys they hold; cannot self-target). Step-up 'user' + checkPermissionLevel.

permissions.description: Map of permissionKey -> 0|1|2 (0 clears the override)

403.description: Self-target blocked, target equal/higher authority, or modifying a permission you lack (PERMISSION_DENIED)

get.summary: List a user's active sessions (device/ip/last-seen). Step-up 'user' + checkPermissionLevel.

403.description: Missing changeUser or target equal/higher authority

post.summary: Terminate all of a user's sessions (cannot self-target). Step-up 'user' + checkPermissionLevel.

403.description: Self-target blocked or target equal/higher authority

get.summary: Enrollment data. No query: { students, courses }. With ?userId: { enrolledCourseIds } after authority guard. Step-up 'enrollment'.

403.description: Missing manageEnrolment or target equal/higher authority

post.summary: Add or remove a single enrollment (target-authority guarded). Step-up 'enrollment'.

403.description: Missing manageEnrolment or target equal/higher authority

post.summary: Atomically commit staged adds/removes for one student; returns fresh enrolled set. Step-up 'enrollment'.

400.description: Missing userId, non-array adds/removes, or batch too large

403.description: Missing manageEnrolment or target equal/higher authority

get.summary: List roles with permissions, member counts, and the registration default. Step-up 'roles'.

200.description: { roles, rolePermissions, memberCounts, defaultRoleId, allPermissions, permissionPrereqs, adminPermissions }

403.description: Missing manageRoles permission

post.summary: Create a role (must be strictly lower privilege; seeded from default role's grants). Step-up 'roles'.

403.description: Missing manageRoles or level equal/higher than caller

409.description: Role name or permission level already exists

put.summary: Update a role's name/level/description/permissions (cannot edit equal/higher authority; delta-aware prereq validation). Step-up 'roles'.

permissions.description: Map of permissionKey -> '1'|true (only keys the admin holds are honored)

403.description: Role equal/higher authority, level too high, or modifying a permission you lack

409.description: Role name or permission level already exists

delete.summary: Delete a role (system roles blocked; deleting the current default requires a replacement via new_default). Step-up 'roles'.

new_default.description: Replacement default role_id (null/'' = blank/no-access); required only when deleting the current default role

403.description: Role equal/higher authority, or replacement default too privileged

409.description: Role is the default — replacement required (error:'default_role')

get.summary: Site settings, sliced per pane (?pane=general|cloudflare|workers|transcoding; no pane = full blob). Step-up 'settings'.

200.description: Settings payload for the requested pane

403.description: Missing manageSite permission

put.summary: Save general site settings (partial; validated). Step-up 'settings'.

403.description: Missing manageSite permission

put.summary: Save default-quality global profile set, plus optional audio normalization and site-wide audio bitrate. Step-up 'settings'.

profiles.description: Non-empty profile array; system rows may not be dropped

400.description: Invalid profiles, dropped system profile, or invalid audio settings

403.description: Missing manageSite permission

500.description: Failed to save default transcoding profiles

put.summary: Save enhanced-quality global profile set (profile array only). Step-up 'settings'.

profiles.description: Non-empty profile array; system rows may not be dropped

400.description: Invalid profiles or dropped system profile

403.description: Missing manageSite permission

500.description: Failed to save enhanced transcoding profiles

post.summary: Generate a new video-HMAC secret key. Step-up 'settings'.

403.description: Missing manageSite permission

500.description: Failed to generate HMAC secret key

put.summary: Update video-HMAC token validity hint (min 600s). Step-up 'settings'.

400.description: Validity must be at least 600 seconds

403.description: Missing manageSite permission

put.summary: Enable/disable video-playback HMAC (enable requires a configured secret). Step-up 'settings'.

400.description: Cannot enable without a secret key

403.description: Missing manageSite permission

post.summary: Create a worker access key; returns the one-time plaintext secret. Step-up 'settings'.

403.description: Missing manageSite permission

post.summary: Pause an active worker key. Step-up 'settings'.

403.description: Missing manageSite permission

409.description: Key is deactivated; use Reactivate first

post.summary: Resume a paused worker key back to active. Step-up 'settings'.

403.description: Missing manageSite permission

409.description: Key is deactivated; use Reactivate first

post.summary: Reactivate a deactivated worker key via forced secret rotation; returns the new one-time secret. Step-up 'settings'.

403.description: Missing manageSite permission

409.description: Key is not deactivated; cannot reactivate

post.summary: Rename a worker key's label (empty clears it; deactivated keys rejected). Step-up 'settings'.

403.description: Missing manageSite permission

delete.summary: Permanently delete a worker key (any status). Step-up 'settings'.

403.description: Missing manageSite permission

get.summary: Course playback stats: base overall+students, or ?userId for one student's per-video stats. Requires manageCourse AND viewPlaybackStat plus course access.

403.description: Missing manageCourse/viewPlaybackStat or no course access

delete.summary: Reset playback stats for the whole course (all students). Requires changeCourse + course access.

403.description: Missing changeCourse or no course access

get.summary: A user's playback stats: base watched-courses list, or ?courseId for per-video stats. Step-up 'user' + checkPermissionLevel.

403.description: Missing changeUser or target equal/higher authority

delete.summary: Reset a student's playback stats (?courseId scopes to one course, else all). Step-up 'user' + checkPermissionLevel.

403.description: Missing changeUser or target equal/higher authority

delete.summary: Global kill switch: wipe every student's watch history and resume positions. Step-up 'settings'.

403.description: Missing manageSite permission

get.summary: List transcoding jobs (error/active/finished, with live Redis progress overlay). Step-up 'transcoding'.

403.description: Missing manageSite permission

post.summary: Soft-clear all completed transcoding tasks. Step-up 'transcoding'.

403.description: Missing manageSite permission

post.summary: Create a new multipart upload session for a new video. Validates filename extension (mp4/mkv/mov/webm/m4v/avi/flv/wmv/ts/mpg/mpeg/3gp) and fileSize (<=50GB), verifies the course exists, gates course-scoped admins (no allCourseAccess) on enrollment in the target course, checks a title/module/date metadata conflict, then initiates an R2 multipart upload and records the session under createdBy=user.

filename.description: Original source filename; extension must be an allowed video type

fileSize.description: Total file size in bytes; positive integer, <=50GB

contentType.description: MIME type for the R2 object; defaults to application/octet-stream

200.description: Session created; returns { uploadId, totalParts, partSize }

400.description: Missing required fields or invalid filename/fileSize

403.description: Course-scoped admin not enrolled in the target course

409.description: Metadata conflict with an existing video (returns { conflict:true, ... })

post.summary: Create a multipart upload session that replaces the source of an existing finished video. Validates filename/fileSize, requires the video to exist in 'finished' status, gates course-scoped admins (no allCourseAccess) on enrollment in the video's course, checks for an in-flight replace conflict, then initiates an R2 multipart upload and records the session under createdBy=user.

videoId.description: Id of the finished video to replace

filename.description: Original source filename; extension must be an allowed video type

fileSize.description: Total file size in bytes; positive integer, <=50GB

contentType.description: MIME type for the R2 object; defaults to application/octet-stream

200.description: Replace session created; returns { uploadId, totalParts, partSize }

400.description: Missing required fields, invalid filename/fileSize, or video not found / not in finished state

403.description: Course-scoped admin not enrolled in the video's course

409.description: An active replace session already exists (returns { conflict:true, type:'replace', uploadId })

post.summary: Return presigned R2 URLs for the requested part numbers of an active upload session. Requires the session to be active and owned by the requesting user (created_by == user_id).

partNumbers.description: Array of part numbers to presign

200.description: Returns { urls } of presigned part URLs

403.description: Session not owned by the requesting user

404.description: Upload session not found or not active

post.summary: Keep an active upload session alive by updating its heartbeat. Scoped to the session owner (heartbeat is applied for uploadId + user_id). Requires auth only; no RBAC permission.

404.description: Upload session not found or not active (or not owned by user)

post.summary: Finalize the R2 multipart upload and commit the video. Requires the session to be active/completing and owned by the requesting user. For a new upload creates the video record (video_type='cmaf') and queues a processing task; for a replacement resets the video, enqueues old source/output prefix deletion, clears processing_queue and watch_progress, invalidates caches, and queues a new task.

parts.description: Array of completed part descriptors (part number + ETag) for R2 completion

204.description: Upload completed; video created or reset and queued for processing

403.description: Session not owned by the requesting user

404.description: Upload session not found or not active/completing

post.summary: Abort an upload session and fire-and-forget the R2 multipart abort with retry backoff. Idempotent: returns 204 if already aborted/completed. Requires the session to be owned by the requesting user. Requires auth only; no RBAC permission.

403.description: Session not owned by the requesting user

post.summary: Record playback watch progress for the current user. Validates video_id/position/delta, applies anti-abuse credit rules, enforces course enrollment (unless allCourseAccess), and writes to Redis (flushed to DB every 15 min).

position.description: Finite, non-negative last playback position in seconds; must be <= video.duration_seconds + 1.

delta.description: Watched seconds to credit this flush; finite, non-negative. delta > 60 drops credit to 0 but still updates last_position.

403.description: Not enrolled in the video's course.

422.description: Invalid video_id, position, or delta (missing/malformed/out of range).

post.summary: Update video metadata (title, description, module_number, lecture_date). Requires changeVideo permission; course-scoped admins must be enrolled in the video's course.

title.description: New video title (applied only if present).

module_number.description: New module number (applied only if present).

lecture_date.description: New lecture date (applied only if present).

403.description: Permission denied (missing changeVideo) or not enrolled in the video's course.

post.summary: Delete a video (DB row plus R2 asset cleanup via deletionService). Requires deleteVideo permission; course-scoped admins must be enrolled in the video's course.

403.description: Permission denied (missing deleteVideo) or not enrolled in the video's course.

post.summary: Delete the original uploaded source file from R2 (enqueues prefix deletion, nulls r2_source_key). Requires changeVideo permission; course-scoped admins must be enrolled in the video's course. Video must be in 'finished' state with a source still present.

400.description: Video not in 'finished' state, or source already cleaned.

403.description: Permission denied (missing changeVideo) or not enrolled in the video's course.

post.summary: Re-queue a failed video for transcoding. Requires uploadVideo permission; course-scoped admins must be enrolled in the video's course. Video must be in 'error' state.

400.description: Video not in 'error' state, or no error task found to retry.

403.description: Permission denied (missing uploadVideo) or not enrolled in the video's course.

get.summary: Serve the raw 16-byte HLS AES-128 encryption key for playback. Requires the in-handler allowPlayback permission (not RBAC middleware) and course enrollment unless allCourseAccess. Video must be 'finished' with a stored key. Returns application/octet-stream, Cache-Control: no-store.

403.description: Playback not allowed (missing allowPlayback) or not enrolled in the video's course.

404.description: Key not found (video missing, not finished, or no encryption_key).

get.summary: Generate and return a refreshed HMAC playback token for the video's asset path (hot path, cache-backed). Requires the in-handler allowPlayback permission (not RBAC middleware) and course enrollment unless allCourseAccess. Returns { token, tokenValiditySeconds } (token null if HMAC disabled).

200.description: JSON { token, tokenValiditySeconds } (token may be null if HMAC not configured).

403.description: Playback not allowed (missing allowPlayback) or not enrolled in the video's course.

post.summary: Exchange worker keyId/keySecret for a bearer session token. Unauthenticated entry point; validates the key, runs credential-leak detection (deactivates key + 401 on a 'leak' verdict), then issues a bearer token bound to the caller IP.

keySecret.description: Worker key secret; validated against the stored key.

401.description: Invalid/deactivated worker key, or credential leak detected (key deactivated).

get.summary: Atomically reserve up to availableSlot tasks (capped at 32) for the authenticated worker. Returns an empty list when the key is paused or the negative queue cache says the queue is likely empty; 401 if the key is no longer active/paused.

200.description: { tasks: [ { videoId } ] } — empty when paused, no free slots, or queue empty.

401.description: Missing/invalid/expired bearer token, IP mismatch, or worker key no longer active.

post.summary: Lease an array of previously-reserved videoIds for the authenticated worker, returning per-video lease results. Re-checks key status: a non-active (paused/deactivated) key gets an empty results list rather than an error.

200.description: { results: [ { videoId, status: 'leased'|'taken'|'notfound', ...spec } ] }; empty results if key not active.

401.description: Missing/invalid/expired bearer token or IP mismatch.

post.summary: Batched per-job transcode status update. Accepts an array of job status records and returns an ack per job.

jobs.description: Array of { jobId, status, stage?, progress?, errorMessage? } status records.

401.description: Missing/invalid/expired bearer token or IP mismatch.

post.summary: Mark a single transcode job complete. Records optional duration and poster flag; 204 on success, 404 if the jobId is unknown.

durationSeconds.description: Output media duration in seconds; defaults to null.

hasPoster.description: Whether a poster image was produced; only strict true counts.

401.description: Missing/invalid/expired bearer token or IP mismatch.

post.summary: Generate presigned PUT URLs for a job's HLS output filenames. 404 if the task/job is unknown.

jobId.description: Job identifier the uploads belong to.

filenames.description: Non-empty list of output filenames to presign.

401.description: Missing/invalid/expired bearer token or IP mismatch.

get.summary: Return all site MFA/step-up settings: the sudo-window durations (general) plus the per-scenario step-up policies (enrollment, user, roles, transcoding, settings). Requires manageSite. Gated by requireStepup('settings') but the 'settings' scenario is write-only scope so GETs pass without a fresh step-up.

200.description: { general: { onetime_timeout_seconds, level_1_timeout_seconds, level_2_timeout_seconds }, policies: { <scenario>: { enabled, level, scope, reuse } } }

403.description: Missing manageSite permission (code PERMISSION_DENIED)

put.summary: Save the step-up sudo-window durations: one-time window plus per-level (level_1/level_2) persistent windows. Requires manageSite. Gated by requireStepup('settings') — a mutation, so a fresh step-up is enforced when the 'settings' scenario is enabled (403 step_up_required otherwise). Validates ranges (one-time 60-3600s, levels 60-31536000s) and that level_2 <= level_1.

level_2_timeout_seconds.description: Level 2 persistent window in seconds (60-31536000); must not exceed level 1

400.description: Validation failed (out-of-range value or level_2 > level_1)

403.description: Missing manageSite permission (PERMISSION_DENIED) or fresh step-up required (code step_up_required)

put.summary: Save the changed per-scenario step-up policy grid in one request. Body is a policies object keyed by scenario (send only changed rows); each policy validated all-or-nothing to { enabled, level(1|2), scope(W|RW), reuse(persistent|one-time) } over known scenarios enrollment/user/roles/transcoding/settings. Requires manageSite. Gated by requireStepup('settings'); additionally, enabling or raising the 'settings' policy triggers a self-protection guard requiring a FRESH step-up at the TARGET level (403 step_up_required).

policies.description: Map of scenario -> { enabled:boolean, level:1|2, scope:'W'|'RW', reuse:'persistent'|'one-time' }; only changed scenarios need be included

400.description: Missing/invalid policies object or a policy failed validation (unknown scenario, bad level/scope/reuse)

403.description: Missing manageSite permission (PERMISSION_DENIED); route-level step-up required; or self-protection step-up at target level required (code step_up_required, includes accepted[] and scenario:'settings')

get.summary: List courses (with per-course material counts) the caller can access materials for. Scoped by allCourseAccess vs enrollment inside the service.

403.description: Missing accessAttachments permission (code PERMISSION_DENIED).

get.summary: List materials for a course. Enrollment-scoped (allCourseAccess bypasses); requires an active course.

403.description: Not enrolled in this course (code COURSE_FORBIDDEN).

404.description: Course not found or inactive (code COURSE_NOT_FOUND).

post.summary: Initiate a material upload: creates an attachment upload_session and returns uploadId + presigned R2 PUT URL. Enrollment-scoped. Rejects video extensions and files over 100 MB.

filename.description: Original filename; must have a non-video extension.

module_number.description: Module/week identifier the material belongs to.

201.description: { uploadId, uploadUrl } — presigned PUT URL for direct R2 upload.

400.description: Missing required fields, file too large, missing extension, or blocked video extension.

403.description: Missing uploadAttachments permission, or not enrolled in this course.

post.summary: Keep an in-flight attachment upload session alive (Redis-only, no DB write). Client stops on 404.

403.description: Missing uploadAttachments permission.

404.description: Session not found, terminal, or owned by a different user.

post.summary: Finalize an attachment upload: re-stamps R2 object headers, verifies the course still exists, and inserts the course_materials row. Returns 410 (with R2 cleanup) if the course was deleted mid-upload.

module_number.description: Optional module override recorded on the material row; ignored unless a string.

200.description: { materialId } — the created course_materials row id.

403.description: Missing uploadAttachments permission.

404.description: Session not found, wrong type, wrong owner, or not in active/completing state.

410.description: Course was deleted while upload was in flight; R2 object cleanup enqueued.

post.summary: Cancel an in-flight attachment upload: marks the session aborted and enqueues the R2 object for deletion with a buffer.

403.description: Missing uploadAttachments permission.

404.description: Session not found, wrong type, or owned by a different user.

get.summary: Return a presigned R2 URL that opens the material inline in the browser. Enrollment-scoped on top of accessAttachments.

403.description: Missing accessAttachments permission, or not enrolled (code COURSE_FORBIDDEN).

get.summary: Return a presigned R2 URL for the material as an attachment download (or inline when ?mode=view). Enrollment-scoped on top of accessAttachments.

200.description: { downloadUrl } — presigned attachment URL (inline if mode=view).

403.description: Missing accessAttachments permission, or not enrolled (code COURSE_FORBIDDEN).

put.summary: Edit a material's filename and/or module_number. Requires uploadAttachments AND enrollment in the material's course (global permission is bounded by enrollment). Rejects filenames over 255 chars or containing path separators.

filename.description: New filename, 1-255 chars, no / or \ separators.

module_number.description: New module/week identifier; must be non-empty if provided.

400.description: Invalid filename length, path separators, or empty module_number.

403.description: Missing uploadAttachments permission, or not enrolled (code COURSE_FORBIDDEN).

delete.summary: Delete a material and enqueue its R2 object for deletion. Requires deleteAttachments AND enrollment in the material's course (global permission is bounded by enrollment).

204.description: Material deleted; R2 object cleanup enqueued.

403.description: Missing deleteAttachments permission, or not enrolled (code COURSE_FORBIDDEN).

get.summary: Get the DreamSSO connection config: editable issuer/client_id/account_portal plus derived view-only callback, backchannel, jwks endpoints and current client signing key info. Requires manageSite; step-up 'settings' scenario applies but W-scope lets this GET through.

200.description: Connection config: issuer, client_id, account_portal, callback, backchannel, jwks, client_key

403.description: Missing manageSite permission

put.summary: Update editable SSO connection params (issuer, client_id, account_portal), then reload the live OIDC config. Validates host/id rules. Requires manageSite; gated by 'settings' step-up when enabled.

issuer.description: SSO issuer as scheme://host (host rule, normalized)

account_portal.description: Account portal URL as scheme://host (host rule, normalized)

204.description: Saved and live OIDC config reloaded

403.description: Missing manageSite permission, or step_up_required (settings scenario)

post.summary: Rotate videosite's OIDC client signing key. One-click: the replaced key stays published for overlap and the SSO re-fetches JWKS on the unknown kid. Requires manageSite; gated by 'settings' step-up when enabled.

403.description: Missing manageSite permission, or step_up_required (settings scenario)

get.summary: Get the service-to-service mTLS status (CSR/cert/enforce state) from mtlsService.getStatus(). Requires manageSite; step-up 'settings' W-scope lets this GET through.

403.description: Missing manageSite permission

delete.summary: Reset/clear the mTLS setup (CSR, cert, enforcement) via mtls.reset(). Requires manageSite; gated by 'settings' step-up when enabled.

403.description: Missing manageSite permission, or step_up_required (settings scenario)

post.summary: Start mTLS setup by generating a CSR (optional common name). Requires manageSite; gated by 'settings' step-up when enabled.

cn.description: Optional certificate common name passed to mtls.startSetup()

403.description: Missing manageSite permission, or step_up_required (settings scenario)

post.summary: Install the signed client certificate returned for the CSR. Validates via mtls.installCert(). Requires manageSite; gated by 'settings' step-up when enabled.

403.description: Missing manageSite permission, or step_up_required (settings scenario)

put.summary: Enable or disable mTLS enforcement via mtls.setEnforce(). Requires manageSite; gated by 'settings' step-up when enabled.

enabled.description: Coerced to boolean; whether to enforce mTLS

403.description: Missing manageSite permission, or step_up_required (settings scenario)

get.summary: Serve the standalone first-run installer SPA page (install.html). Gated by the install token; 404s once the site is installed. Sets Cache-Control: no-store.

404.description: Site already installed — install route rejected

503.description: Not installed and no valid install token — neutral unavailable page

post.summary: Step 1: probe DB/Redis/R2, apply schema, run migrations, write .env, adopt config in-process. Nothing is committed until every probe passes.

422.description: Validation errors or a probe (DB/Redis/R2) failed — {errors:{...}}

500.description: Setup, Redis connect, or migrations failed

post.summary: Step 2: save site_name/site_protocol/site_hostname and reload OIDC config; returns the derived callback/events/JWKS URLs.

siteName.description: Display name (<=100 chars); becomes the OIDC client name

post.summary: Step 3: save SSO connection (issuer/client_id/portal), reload OIDC config, and mint this RP's client signing key so the SSO can fetch-verify jwks_uri at registration.

200.description: Saved and client key ensured: {ok:true, clientId, kid, created}

get.summary: Non-blocking OIDC discovery probe for the SSO issuer field.
Step 4: current mTLS client-certificate setup status.

post.summary: Generate an ECDSA P-256 key in place (never leaves) and return a CSR for the given CN.
Install the signed client certificate returned by the CA.

get.summary: Step 5: everything the operator pastes into the SSO's new-client form (issuer, client_id, derived URLs, key info) plus a self JWKS-readability preflight.

post.summary: The gate: publish the role catalogue and require one signed roles.sync (204) from the SSO proving registration, key verification, and catalogue acceptance.

422.description: Verification failed — result payload with failure reason

post.summary: Re-verify (never trust a stale client-side verified), flip the installed latch, burn the install token, clear the install_token cookie, and return the sign-in URL. From here /install 404s.

skippedCert.description: Whether the operator skipped the mTLS cert step (echoed back)

422.description: Re-verification failed — result payload with failure reason
